title: Grant backend signer VERIFIER_ROLE
body:
Problem: /sbt/mint fails when backend signer lacks VERIFIER_ROLE on LifePassSBT.
Scope: Derive backend signer address, grant VERIFIER_ROLE from admin key, verify on-chain role assignment.
Acceptance Criteria:
- /sbt/mint succeeds on Amoy with real tx hash
- Role assignment transaction hash recorded in docs/ops runbook
- Health check remains green after change

title: Improve mint endpoint revert transparency
body:
Problem: API currently returns generic 500 for EVM reverts.
Scope: Decode and return actionable revert reason for /sbt/mint and related contract calls.
Acceptance Criteria:
- API returns explicit error for role missing, paused contract, duplicate tokenId
- Frontend surfaces backend error text
- Tests cover at least 3 failure modes

title: Add idempotent mint guard per profile
body:
Problem: duplicate or concurrent mint attempts can create inconsistent profile state.
Scope: Enforce single-mint semantics per user/profile with lock/idempotency key behavior.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Second mint attempt returns 409 with clear reason
- Race condition tests added
- Profile write model remains consistent after failed retries

title: Migrate profile and trust storage to PostgreSQL
body:
Problem: JSON file persistence is not production-safe.
Scope: Replace file-based profile/trust stores with PostgreSQL models and migration scripts.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Profile and trust data persisted in Postgres
- Existing APIs remain backward compatible
- Migration and rollback scripts documented

title: Add production observability baseline
body:
Problem: limited traceability across signup-verify-mint lifecycle.
Scope: Structured logging, request IDs, health/readiness separation, and error correlation.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Each request has correlation ID in logs
- Separate /health and /ready semantics implemented
- Dashboard/query can trace full user flow

title: Expand profile schema to full identity fields
body:
Problem: identity schema does not yet include all blueprint profile DNA fields.
Scope: Add legal name, covenant name, callings, purpose statement, and richer skills model.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Validation schemas updated
- Signup/dashboard UI updated
- API docs updated with new fields

title: Build verification workflow engine
body:
Problem: verification process is basic and not fully workflow-driven.
Scope: Introduce reviewer states, evidence records, decision history, and audit trail.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Status transitions enforced by role
- Decision events are immutable and auditable
- Only approved users proceed to mint

title: Implement web-of-trust endorsements
body:
Problem: no formal endorsement graph exists.
Scope: Endorsement model, anti-self-endorsement constraints, and reputation weighting.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Users can endorse others with signed intent
- Invalid or duplicate endorsements rejected
- Trust engine consumes endorsements

title: Auto-promote to Silver after two endorsements
body:
Problem: viral loop rule is not implemented.
Scope: Implement rule-based trust promotion and event logging.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Two valid endorsements auto-set Silver status
- Promotion event includes reason and timestamp
- Rule is configurable via env/config

title: Implement profile privacy controls
body:
Problem: users cannot choose public/private visibility per field.
Scope: Add field-level visibility policy and selective disclosure responses.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Visibility matrix stored and enforced
- Public API responses are policy-filtered
- User can update privacy settings from dashboard

title: Add on-chain commitments and action attestations
body:
Problem: commitments and verified actions are not first-class on-chain records.
Scope: Contract + API support for covenant commitments and service completion attestations.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Commitment/attestation transactions are queryable
- API returns tx hashes and statuses
- Contract tests cover write/read and permission checks

title: Formalize trust tier policy engine
body:
Problem: Bronze/Silver/Gold logic is not centralized.
Scope: Deterministic tier computation with reason codes.
Acceptance Criteria:
- /trust endpoint returns tier + rationale
- Tier transitions are audited
- Unit tests cover boundary scores

title: Enforce portal access policy middleware
body:
Problem: portal routing exists but hard authorization rules are minimal.
Scope: Tier/claim-based authorization middleware for each portal.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Unauthorized access returns 403 with requirement detail
- Portal policy map is configurable
- Integration tests cover each portal

title: Implement cross-portal LifePass SSO assertions
body:
Problem: one identity login across portals is not complete.
Scope: Signed session/assertion tokens accepted by multiple portal services.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User signs in once and accesses at least two portals
- Assertions include trust tier and key claims
- Token validation spec documented

title: Integrate real GPT-backed Purpose Guide
body:
Problem: current chat guide is stubbed logic.
Scope: Add model adapter, prompt templates, and context retrieval flow.
Acceptance Criteria:
- AI responses use profile + trust context
- Configurable model/provider via env
- Safe fallback behavior when provider unavailable

title: Upgrade vector retrieval to production vector DB
body:
Problem: local deterministic embeddings store is non-production.
Scope: Replace with pgvector/Pinecone/Weaviate and retrieval APIs.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Embeddings persisted in managed vector store
- Query relevance improves over baseline
- Migration path documented

title: Add milestone and commitment tracking for AI guide
body:
Problem: guide does not track long-running commitments and milestones.
Scope: Milestone CRUD, reminder logic, and AI recommendation linkage.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Users can create and complete milestones
- AI references active milestones in advice
- Dashboard shows progress timeline

title: Implement AI safety and governance controls
body:
Problem: no formal policy/audit around AI outputs.
Scope: Guardrails, refusal behavior, moderation checks, output audit logs.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Safety policy test suite in CI
- Blocked classes are logged with reason
- Admin can review AI output logs

title: Implement signed QR verification pass
body:
Problem: no offline-capable scan verification flow exists.
Scope: Create QR payload schema and verifier endpoint/app flow.
Acceptance Criteria:
- QR includes signed claims and expiry
- Verifier can validate authenticity and freshness
- UX supports low-connectivity fallback

title: Add NFC pass support for offline verification
body:
Problem: no tap-based verification capability exists.
Scope: NFC credential write/read path and verification middleware.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Android MVP can read and validate NFC pass
- Replayed/expired payloads rejected
- Documentation covers device support limits

title: Upgrade React Native app beyond placeholder
body:
Problem: mobile client is currently placeholder only.
Scope: Build signup, dashboard, trust view, and mint status flows in mobile app.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Mobile onboarding mirrors core web flow
- Wallet integration strategy documented
- Test build runs on Android emulator

title: Integrate WhatsApp and Telegram chat channels
body:
Problem: blueprint calls for voice/chat channels outside web app.
Scope: Add channel adapters and identity-aware messaging bridge.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can interact with guide via one external channel minimum
- Session identity mapping is secure
- Channel failures degrade gracefully

title: Build pilot cohort onboarding module
body:
Problem: pilot audience onboarding is not productized.
Scope: Admin cohort creation, invites, and progress tracking.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Leaders can create and manage cohorts
- Cohort dashboard shows verification funnel
- Export/report capability included

title: Implement first-500 leader free setup workflow
body:
Problem: launch strategy incentive mechanics are manual.
Scope: Program enrollment, quota tracking, and eligibility checks.
Acceptance Criteria:
- First 500 leaders auto-tagged and tracked
- Enrollment status visible in admin dashboard
- Abuse prevention checks in place

title: Add referral and endorsement growth analytics
body:
Problem: viral loop metrics are not measurable yet.
Scope: Instrument invite-to-verify-to-silver funnel with analytics dashboards.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Conversion metrics available by cohort/portal
- Attribution model documented
- Weekly KPI report generation automated

title: Create end-to-end journey test suite
body:
Problem: key journeys are not covered by deterministic E2E tests.
Scope: Automate signup, verify, mint, and portal access scenarios.
Acceptance Criteria:
- CI runs E2E suite reliably
- Flake rate below agreed threshold
- Failure artifacts are downloadable

title: Run security hardening and key-management SOP
body:
Problem: secret hygiene and role-key controls need formalized enforcement.
Scope: Key rotation SOP, least-privilege role map, rate limiting, abuse protections.
Acceptance Criteria:
- SOP documented and tested in staging
- Rate limits enabled on sensitive routes
- Security checklist added to release process

title: Refresh architecture and API documentation
body:
Problem: docs can drift from implementation during rapid iteration.
Scope: Update architecture, API references, trust policy, and runbooks.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Docs match deployed behavior
- Versioned changelog entries for major components
- Onboarding guide supports new contributors
